beginner.title: A / An & Plurals
beginner.content:
📌 A hay An?
Dùng a trước phụ âm (consonant sound): a book, a car, a university (/juː/)
Dùng an trước nguyên âm (vowel sound): an apple, an egg, an hour (/aʊər/)
⚠️ Quy tắc dựa vào âm thanh, không phải chữ cái:
• a university (u đọc là /juː/ → phụ âm)
• an hour (h câm → nguyên âm /aʊ/)
• an honest man (h câm)
• a European country (E đọc là /juː/)
📌 Khi nào dùng A/An?
• Danh từ đếm được số ít, lần đầu đề cập: I have a cat.
• Nghề nghiệp: She is a nurse. He is an engineer.
• Số lượng: a hundred, a million, an hour
• Loại / chủng loại: A dog is a loyal animal.
📌 Danh từ số nhiều (Plurals)
Quy tắcVí dụ
Thêm -sbook → books, car → cars
Tận cùng -s/-ss/-sh/-ch/-x → thêm -esbus→buses, dish→dishes, watch→watches
Tận cùng phụ âm + -y → đổi -y → -iesbaby→babies, city→cities
Tận cùng -f/-fe → đổi -f → -vesleaf→leaves, wife→wives
Bất quy tắcman→men, woman→women, child→children, tooth→teeth, foot→feet, mouse→mice
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She is a engineer. → ✅ She is an engineer.
❌ I have two childs. → ✅ I have two children.
❌ a honest man → ✅ an honest man.
❌ an university → ✅ a university.
I saw an elephant at the zoo.Tôi thấy một con voi ở sở thú.
She is a nurse. He is an engineer.Cô ấy là y tá. Anh ấy là kỹ sư.
There are three children in the park.Có ba đứa trẻ trong công viên.

beginner.title: Articles: a, an, the
beginner.content:
📌 Ba trường hợp dùng mạo từ
Mạo từKhi nào dùngVí dụ
a / anLần đầu nhắc đến; không xác định cụ thểI saw a dog.
theĐã biết / đã nhắc trước / chỉ có một trên đờiThe dog was brown.
— (zero)Danh từ số nhiều / không đếm được nói chung chungI like dogs. I drink water.
📌 Dùng THE khi nào?
• Đã đề cập trước: I have a cat. The cat is black.
• Chỉ có một trên đời: the sun, the moon, the earth, the sky
• Rõ ràng cả hai đều biết: Close the door. (cái cửa cụ thể)
• Tên sông, biển, dãy núi: the Mekong River, the Pacific Ocean, the Alps
• Hình thức so sánh nhất: She is the best student.
📌 KHÔNG dùng THE khi nào?
• Tên người, tên thành phố, quốc gia (thông thường): the Vietnam, the Hanoi, the Tom
• Bữa ăn: I have the breakfast at 7. → I have breakfast at 7.
• Các môn thể thao: I play the football. → I play football.
• Các ngôn ngữ: She speaks the English. → She speaks English.
• Đi học / bệnh viện / nhà tù (mục đích chính): He is at school. She is in hospital.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ I like the dogs. (nói chung) → ✅ I like dogs.
❌ She goes to the school. (học sinh đi học) → ✅ She goes to school.
❌ The Vietnam is beautiful. → ✅ Vietnam is beautiful.
❌ I eat the breakfast. → ✅ I eat breakfast.
I bought a book. The book is very interesting.Tôi mua một quyển sách. Quyển sách rất thú vị.
The sun rises in the east.Mặt trời mọc ở phía đông.
She plays tennis every weekend.Cô ấy chơi tennis mỗi cuối tuần. (không dùng the)

beginner.title: This / That / These / Those
beginner.content:
📌 Từ chỉ định (Demonstratives)
GẦN (near)XA (far)
Số ítthisthat
Số nhiềuthesethose

• This is my pen. (gần tôi)
• That is your house. (xa)
• These are my books. (nhiều, gần)
• Those are her shoes. (nhiều, xa)
📌 Dùng làm tính từ + danh từ
• This book is interesting.
• That car is expensive.
• These shoes are comfortable.
• Those students are hardworking.
📌 Dùng qua điện thoại
• Hello, this is Lan speaking.
• That was a great idea! (sự việc vừa xong)
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ These book is good. → ✅ This book is good. / These books are good.
❌ Those shoe is mine. → ✅ That shoe is mine. / Those shoes are mine.
❌ This are my friends. → ✅ These are my friends.
This is my new phone.Đây là điện thoại mới của tôi. (gần)
Those buildings are very tall.Những toà nhà kia rất cao. (xa, số nhiều)
These apples are delicious.Những quả táo này rất ngon. (gần, số nhiều)

beginner.title: Possessive Adjectives & Pronouns
beginner.content:
📌 Tính từ sở hữu (Possessive Adjectives)
Đứng trước danh từ, không đứng một mình.
Chủ ngữTính từ SHVí dụ
Imymy book
youyouryour bag
hehishis car
sheherher phone
ititsits tail
weourour teacher
theytheirtheir house
📌 Đại từ sở hữu (Possessive Pronouns)
Đứng một mình, không đứng trước danh từ.
Tính từ SHĐại từ SHVí dụ
mymineThat pen is mine.
youryoursIs this bag yours?
hishisThat car is his.
herhersThe bag is hers.
ouroursThis house is ours.
theirtheirsThat dog is theirs.
📌 Sở hữu cách 's
• Tom's book = the book of Tom
• my mum's car = the car of my mum
• the children's toys (số nhiều bất quy tắc + 's)
• the students' books (số nhiều đều + chỉ dấu ')
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She lost her's phone. → ✅ She lost her phone.
❌ The dog wagged it's tail. → ✅ The dog wagged its tail. (its ≠ it's)
❌ This is my's. → ✅ This is mine.
❌ This is her bag or your? → ✅ Is this her bag or yours?
My father is a doctor. His name is Nam.Cha tôi là bác sĩ. Tên ông ấy là Nam.
This is not my pen. It is yours.Đây không phải bút của tôi. Đó là của bạn.
The dog ate its food.Con chó ăn thức ăn của nó.

beginner.title: Object pronouns vs subject pronouns
beginner.content:
📌 Đại từ chủ ngữ & Đại từ tân ngữ
Đại từ chủ ngữĐại từ tân ngữVí dụ
ImeShe called me.
youyouI can see you.
hehimShe doesn't like him.
sheherI see her every day.
ititI like it.
weusCan you see us?
theythemI want to speak to them.
📌 Khi nào dùng đại từ chủ ngữ?
Đại từ chủ ngữ đứng trước động từ – làm chủ ngữ của câu.
• I like your dress.
• He is my friend.
• We live in Hanoi.
• They come from London.
📌 Khi nào dùng đại từ tân ngữ?
Đại từ tân ngữ đứng sau động từ hoặc sau giới từ.
• She called me. (sau động từ)
• Give it to him. (sau giới từ to)
• She is there for me. (sau giới từ for)
• Don't take it from us. (sau giới từ from)
• I want to speak to them. (sau giới từ to)
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ Me and Tom went to the park. → ✅ Tom and I went to the park.
❌ She gave the book to I. → ✅ She gave the book to me.
❌ Him is tall. → ✅ He is tall.
❌ I can see she. → ✅ I can see her.
I see her every Monday.Tôi gặp cô ấy mỗi thứ Hai.
We can see him, but he can't see us.Chúng tôi thấy anh ấy, nhưng anh ấy không thấy chúng tôi.
Give it to them, please.Hãy đưa cái đó cho họ nhé.

beginner.title: Some & Any
beginner.content:
📌 Quy tắc cơ bản
SOMEANY
Khẳng định✅ I have some apples.❌ (thường không dùng)
Phủ định❌ (thường không dùng)✅ I don't have any milk.
Câu hỏi✅ (mời / đề nghị) Would you like some tea?✅ Is there any sugar?
📌 Dùng với danh từ nào?
• Danh từ đếm được số nhiều: some apples, any books
• Danh từ không đếm được: some water, any milk
📌 Some / Any đứng một mình (thay thế danh từ)
• I need some sugar. – I don't have any. (any = any sugar)
• Are there any tickets? – Yes, there are some.
📌 Từ ghép: someone/anyone, something/anything, somewhere/anywhere
• Is anyone home? – No, there is no one home.
• I need something to eat.
• Did you go anywhere last night?
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ I don't have some money. → ✅ I don't have any money.
❌ Is there some bread? → ✅ Is there any bread? (câu hỏi thật)
❌ I have any friends here. → ✅ I have some friends here.
There is some milk in the fridge.Có một ít sữa trong tủ lạnh.
I don't have any money with me.Tôi không có tiền mang theo.
Would you like some coffee?Bạn có muốn uống cà phê không? (mời)

writing_prompts.example: Last night I stayed home. I didn't go anywhere. I watched some films on TV. There was something interesting on. I ate some popcorn. Nobody came to visit.

writing_prompts.vi: Hỏi và trả lời về những gì có trong lớp học (câu hỏi + phủ định)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Is there any / Are there any / Yes, there are some / No, there aren't any
writing_prompts.example: Are there any computers in your classroom? No, there aren't any. Are there some chairs? Yes, there are some. There are some books but there aren't any tablets.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một điều thú vị bạn thấy hoặc nghe được

beginner.title: Much / Many / A lot of
beginner.content:
📌 Much / Many / A lot of
Danh từ ĐẾM ĐƯỢC số nhiềuDanh từ KHÔNG ĐẾM ĐƯỢC
many✅ many books, many people❌
much❌✅ much water, much time
a lot of / lots of✅ a lot of books✅ a lot of water
📌 Khi nào dùng từng loại?
• much / many: thường dùng trong câu phủ định và câu hỏi
 – I don't have much time. / Do you have many friends?
• a lot of / lots of: thường dùng trong câu khẳng định
 – She has a lot of friends. / There is lots of food.
⚠️ Tuy nhiên, trong văn nói hàng ngày, a lot of có thể dùng ở mọi loại câu.
📌 How much / How many?
• How many + danh từ đếm được: How many students are there?
• How much + danh từ không đếm được: How much does it cost? / How much milk do you need?
📌 A little / A few
• a little + không đếm được (số lượng ít): a little sugar, a little time
• a few + đếm được số nhiều (số ít): a few books, a few friends
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ I have many money. → ✅ I have much money / a lot of money.
❌ She drinks much coffees. → ✅ She drinks a lot of coffee.
❌ How many sugar do you want? → ✅ How much sugar?
There are many students in the school.Có nhiều học sinh trong trường.
I don't have much money with me.Tôi không có nhiều tiền mang theo.
She has a lot of friends.Cô ấy có rất nhiều bạn bè.

beginner.title: Whose
beginner.content:
📌 Whose – hỏi về sở hữu
Whose = của ai?
• Whose + danh từ + is/are ...? (tính từ nghi vấn)
 – Whose bag is this?
 – Whose keys are these?
• Whose đứng một mình (đại từ nghi vấn)
 – Whose is this bag?
 – Whose are these shoes?
📌 Trả lời câu hỏi Whose
Dùng sở hữu cách hoặc đại từ sở hữu:
• Whose bag is this? – It is Tom's. / It is his.
• Whose keys are these? – They are Anna's. / They are hers.
• Whose house is that? – It is my parents'.
📌 Phân biệt Whose vs Who's
• Whose = của ai (sở hữu): Whose book is this?
• Who's = Who is (viết tắt): Who's at the door? = Who is at the door?
⚠️ Hai từ này phát âm giống nhau nhưng nghĩa khác nhau hoàn toàn!
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ Who's book is this? → ✅ Whose book is this?
❌ Whose is that car belong? → ✅ Whose car is that?
❌ Whose this is? → ✅ Whose is this? / Whose + DT + is this?
Whose jacket is this?Đây là áo khoác của ai?
– Whose are these glasses? – They are Minh's.Những chiếc kính này của ai? – Của Minh.
Whose turn is it to clean the board?Đến lượt ai lau bảng?

passage.text: I walked into the classroom and found a bag on my chair. '{{1}} bag is this?' I asked. Nobody answered. I looked inside. There was a wallet. '{{2}} wallet is this?' I asked again. Then I saw a name card: Tom. So the wallet was {{3}}. But the bag – {{4}} was it? I found a timetable inside. It had the name 'Lan' on it. So the bag was {{5}}. '{{6}} the owner of this bag?' I asked loudly. Lan ran in. 'Oh! It's {{7}}! I left it here by mistake.' '{{8}} is this wallet?' I asked. 'It's {{9}}!' said Tom, rushing in too. We all laughed. '{{10}} always loses something,' joked our teacher.

It was sports day at school. Each team had a coloured jersey. '{{1}} jersey is red?' asked the teacher. 'Ours!' shouted Class 7A. '{{2}} team is leading now?' I asked my friend. 'Class 7B,' she said. '{{3}} the captain of 7B?' I asked. 'It's Minh,' she said. '{{4}} shoes are those on the track?' asked a teacher. 'They're {{5}},' said a boy. He had forgotten to put them away. '{{6}} bag is blocking the path?' the teacher called again. '{{7}}!' said another student. At the end of the day, Class 7A won. '{{8}} was the best runner today?' someone asked. 'It was {{9}},' smiled the teacher. Everyone agreed – it was a great day and the victory was {{10}}.

After the party there was a lot of mess. We found many forgotten items. '{{1}} scarf is this?' asked Mum. 'It's {{2}},' said my sister. '{{3}} the person who left this umbrella?' asked Dad. 'I don't know,' I said. '{{4}} bag is under the sofa?' asked my brother. We looked – it was full of books. '{{5}} homework is this?' I asked, pulling out a notebook. The name on the cover was 'Hoa'. So it was {{6}}. '{{7}} are these glasses?' asked Mum. They looked expensive. 'They might be {{8}},' said Dad. '{{9}} turn is it to tidy up?' asked Mum. 'Mine,' I said. It was going to be a long evening. But at least now we knew {{10}} things were {{11}}.

We were getting ready for a school trip. '{{1}} name is on the register first?' asked the teacher. 'It's {{2}},' I said. '{{3}} is in charge of the first-aid kit?' 'That's {{4}} job,' said Minh. We got on the bus. '{{5}} bag is blocking the aisle?' called the driver. 'Sorry, it's {{6}},' said a girl. '{{7}} window seat is this?' asked a boy. 'It's {{8}} – I saved it,' said Anna. After an hour, we arrived. '{{9}} idea was it to come here?' someone asked. '{{10}}!' the whole class cheered, pointing at the teacher.

I found a phone on the bench in the park. The screen was cracked but it still worked. I called the last number. '{{1}} number is this?' asked a voice. 'I found a phone,' I said. '{{2}} phone is it?' he asked. I described it. 'That's {{3}}!' he said. His name was Long. We arranged to meet at the park gate. While I waited, a woman came over. '{{4}} are you?' she asked. 'I'm just returning this phone,' I said. '{{5}} is it?' 'It belongs to someone called Long.' Just then Long arrived. 'It's {{6}}! Thank you!' '{{7}} phone is that in your pocket too?' the woman asked Long with a smile. He laughed. 'That one is {{8}}.' We all laughed. It was {{9}} lucky day – and doing the right thing was its {{10}} reward.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết đoạn hội thoại ngắn về việc tìm đồ thất lạc ở trường
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Whose + danh từ + is this/are these?
writing_prompts.example: I found a bag in the classroom. 'Whose bag is this?' I asked. 'It's mine!' said Lan. 'Whose keys are these?' 'They're Tom's,' she said.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả đồ vật của các thành viên trong gia đình bạn
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Whose + danh từ + sở hữu cách
writing_prompts.example: Whose room is the tidiest? It's my sister's room. Whose car is in the garage? It's my dad's. Whose books are on the shelf? They're mine.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một buổi dọn dẹp sau bữa tiệc – ai để lại đồ gì?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Whose / Who's / đại từ sở hữu
writing_prompts.example: After the party we found many things. Whose scarf is this? It's Hoa's. Whose umbrella is under the sofa? It might be ours. Who's coming to collect their things?

writing_prompts.vi: Đặt câu hỏi và trả lời về đồ dùng trong lớp học
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Whose + danh từ, trả lời bằng đại từ SH hoặc sở hữu cách
writing_prompts.example: Whose pen is this on the teacher's desk? It's Anna's. Whose notebooks are these? They're ours. Whose bag is under the chair? It's his.

writing_prompts.vi: Phân biệt Whose và Who's trong một đoạn văn ngắn
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Whose (sở hữu) vs Who's (= Who is)
writing_prompts.example: Who's the new student in class? Her name is Mai. Whose bag is that red one? It's hers. Who's coming to the trip? Whose idea was it? It was mine!
